title: The 2026 Forward Deployed Engineering Compensation Report: What 1,200 FDEs Earn | Perspective AI
note: New source this round. Frontier-lab (Anthropic/OpenAI/DeepMind) FDE bands: mid-level base $220-230K/TC $385-510K, senior base $275-290K/TC $560-785K, staff/principal base $310-370K/TC $750K-1.2M+.
